title: Section 21
content: Save as otherwise provided in this Act, (a) a document or proceeding requiring authentication by a company; or (b) contracts made by or on behalf of a company, may be signed by any key managerial personnel or 1[an officer or employee of the company] duly authorised by the Board in this behalf.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 1 of 2018, s. 7, for “an officer of the company” (w.e.f. 9-2-2018).
